name: her-estrogen
description: HerEstrogen marketing site. Static front-end (HTML + pre-compiled React) with two Vercel Serverless Function endpoints for OpenLoop webhooks (api/orders/*) + provider/pharmacy hooks (api/prescriptions/*). Intake and checkout are hosted by OpenLoop — this site is marketing-only.
comment_build: app.bundle.js is built LOCALLY and committed (Vercel serves it statically — no Vercel build step). After editing app.jsx you MUST run `npm run build` and re-sync the GitHub Desktop mirror, or the live site will not reflect your changes.
